how_it_works: Vaal skills require souls collected from killing monsters and bosses. Normal mode: base souls required. Merciless difficulty (maps, red maps, Uber zones): double the soul requirement. Souls are gained per monster kill based on its type. Vaal skills share a soul pool with all other Vaal skills socketed — you must choose which to use first.
soul_note: Regular monsters grant 1 soul. Magic monsters grant 3 souls. Rare/unique monsters grant more souls. Bosses grant a large burst. Vaal skill gems can be corrupted for extra power.
tips: Socket multiple Vaal skills to fill the soul pool faster — you only need to cap the one you want to use
Vaal Haste and Vaal Molten Shell are universally useful on almost any build
Vaal skills do not share cooldowns — once souls are gained, the skill is instantly ready
The Soul Gain Prevention debuff (after using a Vaal skill) briefly prevents new soul collection
Vaal Flicker Strike removes the need for Frenzy charges to sustain Flicker Strike
On Pinnacle bosses, use your Vaal burst during the opening phase before mechanics interrupt you

skills.name: Vaal Arc
skills.effect: Powerful arc of lightning chains between multiple enemies, hitting each enemy it passes through.
skills.when_to_use: Dense packs during mapping — chains through entire screens of enemies
skills.notes: Unlike regular Arc, Vaal Arc hits enemies as it chains rather than skipping to chain targets only. Much higher total damage on packs.

skills.name: Vaal Ball Lightning
skills.effect: Fires slow-moving ball lightning projectiles that repeatedly hit enemies they pass through.
skills.when_to_use: Boss fights — position the slow ball on the boss for maximum repeated hits
skills.notes: Extremely high total hit count makes it powerful with on-hit effects (Shock, Elemental Proliferation). Very effective on stationary or slow bosses.

skills.name: Vaal Blade Flurry
skills.effect: Channeled skill that builds charges, releasing a massive burst of spinning blades when released.
skills.when_to_use: Boss burst windows — charge to maximum stacks then release for concentrated damage
skills.notes: The Vaal version deals significantly more total damage than a single rotation of the base skill. Use for opening-burst on bosses.

skills.name: Vaal Blight
skills.effect: Large channeled AoE that applies massive Blight stacks (chaos DoT slowing enemies) in a wide area.
skills.when_to_use: Blight encounters or dense packs — slows and destroys groups quickly
skills.notes: Very low soul cost makes it easy to recharge. The slow is substantial — enemies in the blast radius are nearly frozen in place.

skills.name: Vaal Burning Arrow
skills.effect: Fires a massive burning arrow that explodes on impact, covering a large area in fire.
skills.when_to_use: Boss burst windows — the explosion radius and damage are significantly larger than the base skill
skills.notes: Ignites from Vaal Burning Arrow are very large, scaling well with Ignite duration and spread. Strong for Elementalist ignite chains.

skills.name: Vaal Caustic Arrow
skills.effect: Fires an arrow that creates an enormous caustic ground area dealing heavy chaos DoT.
skills.when_to_use: Boss fights — stand inside the puddle with the boss for maximum DoT stacks
skills.notes: The Vaal version creates a substantially larger and more damaging puddle than the base skill. Essential burst for Caustic Arrow bosses.

skills.name: Vaal Cyclone
skills.effect: Channeled whirlwind that greatly increases Cyclone AoE and deals bonus damage, stunning enemies repeatedly.
skills.when_to_use: Boss fights — the expanded AoE and bonus damage make bosses much faster
skills.notes: The Vaal version allows Cyclone to hit at full channel-speed immediately without ramping. Strong burst potential on bosses.

skills.name: Vaal Double Strike
skills.effect: Performs two powerful strikes and creates twin illusory copies that repeat the strikes.
skills.when_to_use: Boss fights — summon copies for extra DPS during the encounter
skills.notes: The copies deal significant damage and count as your hits for on-hit effects. Strong burst on stationary bosses.

skills.name: Vaal Earthquake
skills.effect: Performs a massive slam that immediately triggers the aftershock, covering an enormous area.
skills.when_to_use: Boss fights or dense rare packs — the instant aftershock skips the delay of the base skill
skills.notes: Eliminates the aftershock delay entirely, making it a pure burst skill. Very strong combined with Fortify and Endurance Charges for defensive Juggernauts.

skills.name: Vaal Flicker Strike
skills.effect: Teleport to and strike a sequence of enemies rapidly, ignoring the Frenzy Charge requirement.
skills.when_to_use: Boss fights without reliable Frenzy sustain — provides sustained Flicker without charges
skills.notes: The Vaal version does not consume Frenzy Charges, making it self-sustaining for a limited window. Essential for Flicker builds facing charge-dry bosses.

skills.name: Vaal Ground Slam
skills.effect: Massive slam that creates a huge shockwave cone, shattering the ground in a wide arc.
skills.when_to_use: Dense packs or boss positioning — the cone covers enormous ground
skills.notes: The Vaal version has significantly more range and damage than the base skill. Pairs well with Endurance Charges for defensive stacking.

skills.name: Vaal Haste
skills.effect: Aura that grants substantially increased Attack, Cast, and Movement Speed to you and nearby allies.
skills.when_to_use: Any boss fight or clear window — universally useful on every build
skills.notes: One of the most broadly powerful Vaal skills in the game. The speed bonuses are significantly higher than the base Haste aura. Nearly every endgame build benefits.

skills.name: Vaal Ice Nova
skills.effect: A massive ice nova that freezes and shatters nearby frozen enemies, spreading Freeze.
skills.when_to_use: Dense packs — the freeze explosion chain-detonates entire groups
skills.notes: On-frozen-ground explosion radius is very large. Combine with Hypothermia and Elemental Proliferation for screen-clearing freeze chains.

skills.name: Vaal Impurity of Fire
skills.effect: Aura that causes nearby enemies to be unable to use Fire Ailment Immunity and removes their Fire Resistance reduction.
skills.when_to_use: Content where bosses have fire immunity — allows ailment application on otherwise immune targets
skills.notes: Counters Fire Immunity on rare monsters and specific boss phases. Also available for Cold (Vaal Impurity of Ice) and Lightning (Vaal Impurity of Lightning). Very situational but essential when needed.

skills.name: Vaal Molten Shell
skills.effect: Creates a massive shell of armour that absorbs a large portion of incoming damage before detonating.
skills.when_to_use: Before any large incoming hit — pop proactively before engaging dangerous content
skills.notes: The absorption value is significantly higher than the base Molten Shell. Essential on armour-stacking builds. The explosion when it breaks deals fire damage to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Vaal Righteous Fire
skills.effect: Instantly deals massive fire damage to all nearby enemies based on your total life and ES.
skills.when_to_use: Boss burst or dense rare packs — the instant hit scales with life pool
skills.notes: Does NOT grant the RF aura — it is a pure burst nuke. Deals enormous damage proportional to your total life+ES pool. Best on very tanky builds with 8000+ combined pool.

skills.name: Vaal Spark
skills.effect: Fires a massive storm of sparks that fill the screen, lasting for several seconds.
skills.when_to_use: Dense packs or stationary bosses — sparks saturate the area for continuous hits
skills.notes: Extremely high total hit count — all sparks can hit the same enemy. Best combined with Volley or increased Projectile count support gems.

skills.name: Vaal Storm Call
skills.effect: Places multiple storm call markers on the ground that instantly erupt, dealing lightning damage in multiple areas.
skills.when_to_use: Dense packs — instantly detonates multiple screens of enemies
skills.notes: Unlike the base skill's delay, Vaal Storm Call erupts immediately. Strong clear tool when positioned in a dense group of monsters.

skills.name: Vaal Summon Skeletons
skills.effect: Instantly summons a large army of powerful skeletons that last for a limited duration.
skills.when_to_use: Boss fights — the powerful temporary skeletons burst down the first phase
skills.notes: The Vaal skeletons are significantly more powerful than base summons. They disappear after a duration rather than persisting. Use at start of boss fights.

skills.name: Vaal Ancestral Warchief
skills.effect: Summons a powerful Warchief totem that grants a buff to Melee Physical Damage while active.
skills.when_to_use: Boss fights — the Warchief buff stacks with the base Ancestral Warchief for double totem damage
skills.notes: Stacks with the non-Vaal version's buff for double the Melee Physical Damage bonus. Very powerful in duo-totem configurations.
